one_line: Gupta chakravartin of the Gangetic plain, conqueror-poet and veena-playing patron king.

appearance.age_look: Mid-30s, lean but strong build with defined arms and shoulders.
appearance.face: Oval face with high cheekbones, straight nose, medium-full lips, warm medium-brown complexion, a small tilak on the forehead, and a calm, intent gaze that often shifts into a slight confident half-smile.
appearance.hair: Thick black hair parted slightly off-center, pulled back into a neat low topknot at the back of the crown (not high), with a narrow plain gold circlet resting low on the forehead and a short wavy fringe framing the temples.
appearance.costume: Upper body bare except for a finely pleated off-white cotton uttarīya scarf draped diagonally from the left shoulder across the torso to under the right arm, gold-thread border; a knee-length deep red silk dhoti with narrow gold border, wrapped in classic Gupta style with neat front pleats and tied slightly above the navel; a narrow golden waistbelt with a small central clasp; simple gold armlets on both upper arms, a single thin gold bangle on the right wrist, and a short beaded necklace of small gold and reddish carnelian beads; feet in simple brown leather sandals; no armor, but the posture and musculature hint at a warrior-king.
appearance.signature: A long, slender recurve bow of dark polished wood with simple horn tips, held in the left hand with an unstrung veena resting against his right shoulder and back—veena body dark brown with a single gourd resonator and minimal ivory inlay—symbolically uniting archer and lyrist types into one prop.

ref_desc: Samudragupta is a lean mid-30s Gupta king with warm medium-brown skin, an oval face with a small tilak, black hair in a low topknot under a plain gold circlet, wearing an off-white gold-bordered uttarīya, deep red gold-bordered dhoti, simple gold ornaments, brown sandals, and carrying a dark wooden recurve bow together with an unstrung dark-brown veena, in a palette of deep red, off-white, gold, warm brown skin and dark wood.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style model sheet of Samudragupta: a lean but strong mid-30s Indian king with warm medium-brown skin, an oval face, straight nose, medium-full lips, high cheekbones, a small tilak, and a calm confident half-smile; his thick black hair is parted slightly off-center and pulled into a neat low topknot at the back of the crown, framed by a short wavy fringe at the temples and encircled by a narrow plain gold circlet resting low on the forehead. His upper body is bare except for an off-white cotton uttarīya with a gold-thread border, draped from his left shoulder across the chest to under the right arm, showing defined but not exaggerated muscles; he wears a knee-length deep red silk dhoti with a narrow gold border, wrapped in classic Gupta style with crisp front pleats, held by a narrow golden waistbelt with a small central clasp. Add simple courtly jewelry: gold armlets on both upper arms, a single thin gold bangle on the right wrist, and a short necklace of small gold and reddish carnelian beads; put simple brown leather sandals on his feet. Place in his left hand a long slender dark-brown wooden recurve bow with simple horn tips, and resting along his back against his right shoulder an unstrung dark brown veena with a single gourd resonator and minimal ivory inlay, so both bow and veena are clearly visible; use a restrained palette focused on deep red, off-white, gold, warm brown skin and dark wood, and keep the design clean and repeatable from front, side and back views.
